transcript: Speaker A: Excuse me... ahh... reservation... I want... How... reservation... [Excuse me... ahh... reservation... I want... How... reservation...] Speaker A: डोक्यामध्ये प्रॉपर इंग्लिश असते पण आपण बोलायचा अडखळतो. या एम्बॅरेसमेंटचं सोल्यूशन मला SpeakX मध्ये सापडलं. याचा एआय ट्युटर तुमचा आवाज ऐकतो आणि ऑन द गो ग्रामर करेक्ट करतो. मी चूक केली की लगेच फ्रेज करेक्ट करतो. यात एअरपोर्ट, हॉटेल बुकिंग आणि कॅफे ऑर्डरिंग सारखे रोलप्ले आहेत. आणि चूक झाली तर एआय तुम्हाला मराठीत शिकवतो की तुम्ही कुठे अडखळता. फक्त ऐकून इंग्लिश येत नाही. हे २० प्रश्न अगदी फ्री आहे. आताच ट्राय करा. [We have proper English in our minds, but we stumble while speaking. I found the solution to this embarrassment in SpeakX. Its AI tutor listens to your voice and corrects your grammar on the go. If I make a mistake, it corrects the phrase immediately. It has roleplays like airport, hotel booking, and cafe ordering. And if you make a mistake, the AI teaches you in Marathi where you are stumbling. You don't learn English just by listening. These 20 questions are absolutely free. Try it now.]
on_screen_text:
ahh... reservation
I!!!!! want
How.... reservation
proper english aste [proper english is there]
pan apan bolaycha [but we while speaking]
atakto [stumble]
Ya embarrassment [This embarrassment]
SpeakX
ke lagach [immediately]
phrase correct karto [corrects the phrase]
ani chuk jhali [and if a mistake happens]
tar AI tumhala [then AI teaches you]
marathi sikhoto [in Marathi]
ki tumhi kutthe atkalat [where you are stumbling]
Fakta aikun [Just by listening]
english yet nahi [English doesn't come]
atach try kara [try now]
summary: A young man showcases his struggle to speak English in public despite knowing it in his head. He introduces SpeakX, an AI-powered English learning app that corrects pronunciation and grammar in real-time, offering explanations in Marathi. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and try 20 free practice questions.
